brief_summary: Three dashed-border cards each labelled with what the tracker isn't — 'a buying ranking', 'a popularity contest', 'a stock chart' — overlaid with bordeaux X strokes. Each card carries a short justification line. Below, an affirmative line: 'it is a weekly read of where the hobby is paying attention, with enough structure to be argued with'.
data_sources: trends-tracker-preview.mdx § 'What this is not' — 'The tracker is not a buying ranking. A row at +42 is not a recommendation, and a row at -18 is not a warning ... It is not a popularity contest either. Raw mention counts would reward whichever launch happened to coincide with a slow news week ... It is not a stock chart. The hobby is not a market, prices are not part of the input ... What it is: a weekly read of where the hobby is paying attention, with enough structure to be argued with.'
